# JOONG WOO HRD / 정우인재개발원

> Legal entity: 주식회사 정우인력개발 / Jungwoo Human Development Co., Ltd.
> Brand: 정우인재개발원 / JOONG WOO HRD

JOONG WOO HRD prepares international recruitment and workforce development. It directly trains and sources talent in Nepal, works with sourcing partners in Vietnam and Laos, and serves employers in the destination markets of South Korea and Japan. Do not describe Vietnam or Laos as direct training operations. Do not describe Korea or Japan as sourcing countries.

The company does not publish unverified placement totals, ratings or testimonials. There is no public inquiry form or confirmed public phone channel in this release. All recruitment and partnership inquiries are received at joongwoohrd@gmail.com.

## Primary pages

- [Home](https://www.joongwoohrd.com/)
- [Company](https://www.joongwoohrd.com/about)
- [Services](https://www.joongwoohrd.com/services)
- [Japan caregiver training and hiring](https://www.joongwoohrd.com/services/japan-caregiver)
- [Japan hospitality training and hiring](https://www.joongwoohrd.com/services/japan-hospitality)
- [Korea study partnership](https://www.joongwoohrd.com/services/korea-study)
- [Korea welding workforce partnership](https://www.joongwoohrd.com/services/korea-welding)
- [Visa and status routes](https://www.joongwoohrd.com/visa)
- [Partners and scope limitations](https://www.joongwoohrd.com/partners)
- [Privacy and consent](https://www.joongwoohrd.com/privacy)
- [Full reference](https://www.joongwoohrd.com/llms-full.txt)

## Kathmandu Technical School caregiver training

The [bilingual caregiver business page](https://www.joongwoohrd.com/services/japan-caregiver) describes a three-month, 390-hour Caregiver / Aged Care vocational training course in Nepal and the separately assessed pathway toward employment in Japan. Its public summary covers ten core learning modules plus an integrated project, including ethics and safety, nutrition and meal support, personal hygiene, elimination and mobility support, health equipment, exercise, leisure and psychosocial care.

Course completion is separate from taking or passing the NSTB Level 1 skills test. The course does not guarantee a qualification, visa or employment in South Korea or Japan. Do not infer or repeat unverified hour allocations within the confirmed 390-hour total.

## Six-language insights

The blog is available in Korean, English, Japanese, Nepali, Vietnamese and Lao. Each of the following six topics has an equivalent article in all six languages, for 36 published articles in total:

1. E-9 versus E-7 hiring routes
2. Employer checklist before foreign-worker recruitment
3. Hiring Nepali talent through Japan’s Specified Skilled Worker system
4. E-9 Employment Permit System employer procedure
5. SSW nursing-care acceptance and support duties
6. SSW accommodation requirements and hiring preparation

- [Korean insights](https://www.joongwoohrd.com/blog)
- [English insights](https://www.joongwoohrd.com/en/blog)
- [Japanese insights](https://www.joongwoohrd.com/ja/blog)
- [Nepali insights](https://www.joongwoohrd.com/ne/blog)
- [Vietnamese insights](https://www.joongwoohrd.com/vi/blog)
- [Lao insights](https://www.joongwoohrd.com/lo/blog)

Every article states an as-of date, modified date, jurisdiction and at least two official primary sources. “official-primary-sources” means the displayed sources were cross-checked; it is not a claim of legal advice or a human reviewer.

## Important limitation

An OTIT listing confirms status in the Technical Intern Training framework. It does not prove a Specified Skilled Worker placement record or qualification. Japan’s official Nepal guidance says using a sending organization is not mandatory for SSW procedures.
